message:
feat(ufunc): expand reduction operations with cumulative and axis support

Concurrent agent work extending the UFuncArray reduction implementation
(208 insertions, 34 deletions in fnp-ufunc/src/lib.rs):

Adds further reduction operation variants including expanded axis
handling, additional keepdims support, and performance improvements
to the inner accumulation loops for existing var/std/argmin/argmax
operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
